message:
feat(fm-layout): incremental layout engine, benchmarks, and proptest regressions

Adds 750+ lines of incremental subgraph re-layout logic to fm-layout,
adds Criterion benchmark suite (incremental vs full recompute, bd-20fq.5)
with Cargo.toml bench/dev-dependency wiring, and commits proptest
regression seeds to prevent future test regressions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc 6e87f7373ad9c763e8122dae6d21603a192b1d8b26fe3a55dce531bbb6a1fdd9 # shrinks to operations = [(0, 0, 0)]
